notes: Phase 1 (Naxxramas 25, The Obsidian Sanctum, The Eye of Eternity) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Feral Druid Dps gear guide. Rings/Trinkets: the source lists 2-3 ranked options in one row (you equip two) — split here into two named slots, top pick in slot 1; combined source text kept for both. Enchants/gems reused from the matching wotlk/p4 spec profile (same stat priorities apply across phases).

items.name: Leggings of the Honored
items.source: 2 or more Drakes Sartharion — 25-man The Obsidian Sanctum

items.name: Surge Needle Ring
items.source: Malygos — 10-man The Eye of Eternity 25 Emblem of Valor

items.name: Ring of Invincibility
items.source: Malygos — 10-man The Eye of Eternity 25 Emblem of Valor

enchants.name: Arcanum of Torment
enchants.source: Knights of the Ebon Blade — Revered

enchants.name: Greater Inscription of the Axe
enchants.source: Sons of Hodir — Exalted (Master's Inscription of the Axe for scribes)

enchants.name: Enchant Cloak — Major Agility
enchants.source: Enchanting (Swordguard Embroidery for tailors; Flexweave Underlay for engineers)

enchants.name: Enchant Bracers — Greater Assault
enchants.source: Enchanting (Fur Lining — Attack Power for leatherworkers)

gems.name: Relentless Earthsiege Diamond (+37 crit, +3% crit damage)
Fractured Cardinal Ruby (+23 crit) — swap to Precise Cardinal Ruby once armor-pen soft-capped
Nightmare Tear (meta activator — the only blue gem needed)
Rigid King's Amber (+16 crit / +23 Agi) for hit — or Accurate Ametrine for expertise, Inscribed Ametrine once capped
